title: UPSSSC Cane Supervisor Vacancy 2026, Notification Out, Apply Online For 1182 Posts -
short_info: UPSSSC Cane Supervisor Vacancy 2026: Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Services Selection Commission (UPSSSC) has issued a notification for the position of Sugarcane Supervisor. The recruitment drive comprises 1182 vacancies. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and apply before 28-07-2026, the last Date. All relevant information regarding the UPSSSC Cane Supervisor Vacancy 2026 recruitment is provided below.
